scripts.check: node --test test/*.test.mjs && node bin/harness.mjs design render examples/canonical/.makeitreal/runs/feature-auth && node bin/harness.mjs gate examples/canonical/.makeitreal/runs/feature-auth --target Ready && node bin/harness.mjs verify examples/canonical/.makeitreal/runs/feature-auth && node bin/harness.mjs wiki sync examples/canonical/.makeitreal/runs/feature-auth && node bin/harness.mjs gate examples/canonical/.makeitreal/runs/feature-auth --target Done
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run plugin:validate
